source: Gillies and Lieber 2011 skeletal muscle extracellular matrix; Standring, Gray's Anatomy connective tissues

structures.name: Tendon
structures.role: Transmits muscle force to bone through dense regular collagen.

structures.name: Ligament
structures.role: Constrains joint motion through dense collagen bands.

structures.name: Perimysium
structures.role: Wraps fascicles and mediates lateral force transmission.
